evals.prompt: Quiero que ningún código roto llegue a producción en mi proyecto Next.js. Tengo el repo en GitHub y Vercel ya despliega automáticamente cuando hago merge a main. ¿Cómo configuro GitHub Actions para que compruebe types, lint y haga build antes de que se pueda mergear una PR? Y también quiero proteger la rama main.
evals.expected_output: Complete .github/workflows/ci.yml with type check (tsc --noEmit), lint, and build steps. Branch protection rules configuration in GitHub (require PR, status checks, dismiss stale approvals). Explanation of how Vercel + GitHub Actions work together.

assertions.description: Includes a complete .github/workflows/ci.yml YAML file with at least 3 steps (checkout, setup-node, and quality checks)
Includes 'npx tsc --noEmit' or equivalent type checking step in the workflow
Includes a lint step (npm run lint or equivalent) in the workflow
Explains branch protection rules: require PR, require status checks to pass, and/or dismiss stale reviews
Explains how Vercel auto-deploys while GitHub Actions adds quality gates (the two systems working together)

evals.prompt: Quiero añadir Lighthouse CI a mi pipeline de GitHub Actions. El requisito es que la accesibilidad nunca baje de 90 y el rendimiento de 85. Si falla, el PR no puede mergearse. ¿Cómo lo configuro?
evals.expected_output: Lighthouse CI GitHub Actions job, lighthouserc.js with correct thresholds (performance 0.85, accessibility 0.90), LHCI_GITHUB_APP_TOKEN secret, and explanation of how needs: quality chains it after the main quality job.

assertions.description: Includes a lighthouserc.js (or .lighthouserc.json) configuration file with assertions section
Sets accessibility threshold to 0.90 (90%) specifically, matching the user's requirement
Sets performance threshold to 0.85 (85%) specifically, matching the user's requirement
Includes a GitHub Actions job or step that runs 'npx lhci autorun' or equivalent Lighthouse CI command
Mentions LHCI_GITHUB_APP_TOKEN secret and where to get it (Lighthouse CI GitHub App)
